productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Peep Toe Beige Peep Toes
description: Celebrate and enhance your feminity with these absolutely stunning heeled shoes from catwalk. With its sleek design and style, this pair is perfect for party wear. Heel: 3& rdquo Upper Slip-on style sandal with a synthetic patent leather upper, back heel cup and forefoot cap with a peep toe for absolute comfort and style Cut-out floral design on the midfoot and forefoot Outsole Non-slip TPU outsole with brand badge on the outsole Shoel care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
